examples.title: Executive Summary PPTX
examples.description: Applies a common executive theme and presentation pattern, then renders a short decision-oriented PPTX deck.

examples.title: Kyberion Marketing Deck PPTX
examples.description: Uses the bundled Kyberion marketing deck pattern content and renders a themed PPTX artifact.

examples.title: Strategic Roadmap PPTX
examples.description: Builds a roadmap-style PPTX with custom milestone content on top of the strategic roadmap pattern.

examples.title: Mermaid Architecture Diagram
examples.description: Renders a Mermaid architecture graph to SVG using the shared Kyberion theme vocabulary.

examples.title: D2 Process Diagram
examples.description: Renders a D2 workflow diagram to SVG for more polished stakeholder-facing process visuals.

examples.title: AWS Terraform Draw.io Document
examples.description: Generates a local .drawio architecture document from an AWS-style graph without sending topology data to external services.

examples.title: Seat Chart XLSX
examples.description: Renders a printable office seat chart workbook from a native XLSX ADF sample.

examples.title: Project WBS XLSX
examples.description: Renders a project WBS workbook suitable for execution planning and delivery checkpoints.

examples.title: RAID Register XLSX
examples.description: Renders a RAID tracker workbook with category-specific styling for operator review.

examples.title: PPTX Master Theme Extract
examples.description: Generates a source deck, distills its theme and master placeholders, and stores the extracted context for inspection.

examples.title: PPTX Master Theme Reuse
examples.description: Extracts a theme from a source PowerPoint and renders a derivative deck that reuses the master slide contract.

examples.title: Proposal Storyline PPTX
examples.description: Builds a proposal storyline from a structured brief, turns it into slide content, and renders a themed PPTX deck.
